# Pain in the Shed
#
# Last updated: 2026-05-25 (v0.1.0 brand-stack lock · Hedera doctrine cleanup · operator-entity unification · ecosystem-wide contact unification)

> MEDIA layer of the DefendableOS ecosystem · the cost-of-intelligence podcast.
> Every episode answers one question: what did it cost to mint this truth?

## Operator

Swarm and Bee LLC · Florida · D-U-N-S 138652395 · DBA Swarm & Bee AI
A surface of DefendableOS · the third-party defense layer for AI operators.

## Surface
- painintheshed.com (CF Pages · auto-deploy from git push)
- /rss.xml (canonical RSS · all platforms pull from here)

## 8 Episode Lanes
- cost-to-mint              what one trusted AI artifact actually costs
- hyperscaler-pain           why big AI is expensive · fragile · power-hungry
- gpu-street-prices          5090s · 3090s · RTX 6000s · Blackwell · used compute
- vast-ai-field-notes        what renters do · what breaks · what earns
- edge-appliance-economics   why not every job needs a hyperscaler
- energy-is-the-receipt      power draw · thermal · cost per deed
- false-honey                when AI looks smart but fails the assignment
- repair-lift                the economics of fixing AI

## Signature segment
Every episode closes with the Cost-to-Mint readout · 8-line breakdown plus
hyperscaler-equivalent and human-only-equivalent comparisons. Cumulative ledger
lives at /cost-to-mint.

## Voice
Operator-grade · CRE-broker cadence · NO sponsored content · NO paywalls ·
NO platform exclusives · NO "subscribe and like" outros.
Ring ring · to the shed.

## Defendable brand stack · canonical v0.1.0 (2026-05-25)

The DefendableOS ecosystem operates as a 10-domain coordinated brand surface.
This canonical block supersedes all prior brand-stack definitions across the network.

- **defendableos.com** — SYSTEM · the operating system / product
- **swarmandbee.ai** — UMBRELLA · operator firm + dataset bakery
- **opendefendable.com** — OPEN · standards body
- **defendablerouter.com** — SPINE · drop-in AI router (write-only audit rail)
- **defendablecloud.com** — COMPUTE · operator-owned private inference (128 RTX 6000 Blackwell)
- **defendableledger.com** — LEDGER · sovereign in-house books and records
- **mrdefendable.com** — FACE · principal voice / human interface
- **offensetotheshed.com** — CULTURE · doctrine + war stories
- **painintheshed.com** — MEDIA · cost-of-intelligence podcast
- **defendablehack.com** — DEV · researcher / hacker tier

Legacy / superseded (not part of v0.1.0):
- ledger.mrdefendable.com → now defendableledger.com
- chat.mrdefendable.com → deprecated
- defendabledocs.com → consolidated into defendableos.com
